query:
SELECT position, COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN league IS NULL OR league = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_liga,
  SUM(CASE WHEN price IS NULL OR price = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_preco,
  SUM(CASE WHEN age IS NULL OR age = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_idade,
  SUM(CASE WHEN imageUrl IS NULL OR imageUrl = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_imagem
FROM players GROUP BY position ORDER BY position;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35VGbBGUduuhukx.298441852ba3 --database hhB4oykfDQM9yCvhQGaX3n --execute SELECT position, COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN league IS NULL OR league = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_liga,
  SUM(CASE WHEN price IS NULL OR price = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_preco,
  SUM(CASE WHEN age IS NULL OR age = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_idade,
  SUM(CASE WHEN imageUrl IS NULL OR imageUrl = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_imagem
FROM players GROUP BY position ORDER BY position;
